templates.name: Q4 Release Compliance Review
templates.description: Standard procedure for validating the Q4 software release candidate against compliance and security standards.

steps.name: Fetch Release Artifacts
steps.description: Retrieve the build manifest and changelog for the latest Q4 candidate.

validation.criteria: Must return a JSON object containing 'build_id' and 'commit_hash'.

steps.name: Compliance Scan
steps.description: Compare the changelog against the 2025 IT Security Policy to identify banned libraries or patterns.

validation.criteria: Must produce a list of 'violations'. If list is empty, return 'status: compliant'.

steps.name: Generate Final Report
steps.description: Compile findings into a PDF report for the CTO.

validation.criteria: Output must be a valid file path ending in .pdf

templates.name: Customer Connections Asset Number Diagram Check
templates.description: Standard procedure for validating all assets are represented on a line diagram.

steps.name: Fetch customer connections submission asset data
steps.description: Send the raw asset information file (CSV, Excel, JSON, or Doc) to the Asset Ops Agent for LLM extraction and logging.

validation.criteria: Must return a JSON object with an 'assets' key containing a list of items with 'asset_number' and 'asset_type'.

steps.name: Extract Asset types from asset legend diagram
steps.description: Analyse each icon and create a descriptive description, extract the matching text for the icon and create a JSON file with Icon description and Icon Text.

validation.criteria: Must return a JSON object with the text for each icon 'Icon' and a discription of the icon 'asset_type' into a JSON format of asset_types.

steps.name: Verify Assets vs Legend
steps.description: Invoke the Verification Agent. Request the user to upload the P&ID Drawing file (PDF or Image) to visually cross-reference the extracted Asset List against the Legend.

validation.criteria: Output must be a valid JSON object containing a 'verification_report' list with status flags for each asset.
